recommended_actions.action: OPERATOR RESCUE: Apply EXP-277 P1/P2/P3 to build-scripts/generate-html.js and test.js. P1: 'annular' -> 'total' at line 1754. P2: aria-label '...claims (...)' -> '...catalog entries (...)' at line 489. P3: insert test assertions after EXP-271 block (with corrected regex: replace Standard Model Explains|Speculative|Outside-Model with Std Model Explains|Unfalsifiable|Not Demonstrated|Refuted by Data). Then node build.js publish. This is the 6th phantom-integration in 6 days — same root cause (push 403 on NEVER_PUSH infrastructure files). Structural fix: decider push-failure should mark issues fix-in-flight not fixed when push 403s on generate-html.js changes.

Curmudgeon queue has 4 items pending review (qids 288 EXP-278, 289 SEC-4.2.2-EXP275, 290 SEC-4.2.7a-EXP-276, 291 PRED-batch-2026-04-29-PRED106). Mode is BAU, interval is 30min — appears fast relative to BAU default of 240min.
